name: devpilot-tool
description: Repo-aware VS Code assistant for chat, analysis, refactoring suggestions, and inline productivity.

devpilot.model.description: Model identifier shown in logs/output and optionally used by backend integrations.

devpilot.inlineFastModelOverride.description: Optional model override used only for inline suggestions to prioritize speed. Leave empty to use provider-specific fast defaults.

devpilot.enabledTools.description: Enabled Devpilot agent tools for chat sessions. Use Devpilot: Configure Tools to manage this list.

devpilot.provider.description: LLM provider used for chat and command workflows.

devpilot.chatMode.description: Default mode for Devpilot chat: chat for direct answers, agent for action-oriented execution guidance, and plan for step-by-step planning.

devpilot.autoAttachCurrentFile.description: Automatically include the active editor file as extra context in chat prompts.

devpilot.agentAllowFileWrites.description: Allow agent mode to execute file-write tool actions after approval. Keep OFF unless you trust the model output.

devpilot.endpoint.description: Optional custom Devpilot backend base URL or /chat URL. Leave empty to use local backend.

devpilot.openaiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible providers when devpilot.provider is openai.

devpilot.anthropicBaseUrl.description: Base URL for Anthropic provider when devpilot.provider is anthropic.

devpilot.groqBaseUrl.description: Base URL for Groq OpenAI-compatible provider when devpilot.provider is groq.

devpilot.openrouterBaseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible provider when devpilot.provider is openrouter.

devpilot.ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for Ollama when devpilot.provider is ollama.

devpilot.requestTimeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for chat and command API calls.

devpilot.enableGuardrails.description: Enable prompt/context sanitization and basic secret redaction before requests.

devpilot.inlineLlmEnabled.description: Use configured LLM for inline suggestions with context-window prompts; local fallback remains active.

devpilot.quickFixEnabled.description: Enable Devpilot Quick Fix code actions. Keep disabled to prioritize ghost inline suggestions only.

devpilot.inlineDiagnosticFixMode.description: When to show diagnostic-based inline fix suggestions: only for errors, for errors and warnings, or always when a fix can be computed on the current line.

devpilot.inlineContextMode.description: Inline context strategy: small cursor window for speed or full file when file size is within limit.

devpilot.inlineMaxFileChars.description: Maximum characters allowed when using full-file inline context mode.

devpilot.inlineIncludeImportedFiles.description: Include local imported files as extra inline context attachments when available.

devpilot.inlineImportedFilesLimit.description: Maximum number of local imported files to include in inline context.

devpilot.agentToolWorkspaceAllowed.description: Agent-specific workspace approvals in the format <agentId>:<toolId> for Agent Swarm tool execution.

devpilot.inlineDebounceMs.description: Debounce window in milliseconds before triggering inline suggestion requests. Lower values feel more immediate but can increase request volume.

devpilot.inlineLlmBudgetMs.description: Maximum time budget for LLM inline suggestion generation before falling back to local suggestions.

devpilot.inlineCacheTtlMs.description: How long inline LLM suggestions remain cached for matching prefix/context requests.

devpilot.inlineCacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of cached inline LLM suggestions retained in memory.

devpilot.toolApproval.defaultReadScope.description: Default approval scope for read-only tools.

devpilot.toolApproval.defaultWriteScope.description: Default approval scope for file-write tools.

devpilot.toolApproval.defaultExecuteScop.description: Default approval scope for terminal/execute tools.

devpilot.toolApproval.defaultBrowserScop.description: Default approval scope for browser interaction tools.

devpilot.toolApproval.defaultNetworkScop.description: Default approval scope for network or external fetch tools.

devpilot.toolApproval.workspaceAllowedTo.description: Tool IDs that are pre-approved for this workspace scope.

devpilot.toolAudit.maxEntries.description: Maximum in-memory audit records retained for tool execution history.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
